name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). 7 bundled profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Researcher / Watch Party / Auction Watcher) + 13 Quick Style moods (Brutalist / Zen / Retro CRT / Executive / Neon / Hacker / Glacier / Midnight / Featherlight / Industrial / Trading Floor / Scholar / Samba). 14 major exchanges (NYSE · TSX · B3 · LSE · Euronext · XETRA · SIX · JSE · TSE · HKEX · SSE · KRX · NSE · ASX) covering all populated continents, grouped by region (Americas / Europe / Africa / Asia / Oceania) via iana-prefix detection. Live 5-state session tracking (OPEN · LUNCH · PRE-MARKET · AFTER-HOURS · CLOSED) — amber ◐ dawn + rose ◒ dusk auction signals, gated by SessionSignalWindow (off / 5-60 min, Quick-Style-composable). Rocket-launch T-HH:MM:SS countdown (progressive to T-Nd Hh MMm at ≥24h). Urgency-tiered green/amber/red. Tabulated sections with frosted-glass. Clipboard snapshots with self-documenting UTC-stamped headers via per-segment Copy actions. /floating-clock:diagnose slash command for health reports. Reveal App in Finder + Copy Time/Active/Next menu utilities. Aesthetic surface: 28 color themes · 12 progress-bar glyphs · 8 corner styles · 7 shadow presets · 7 segment-gap presets · 7 font weights (thin → black) · 7 letter-spacing values · 7 line-spacing values · 7 time-separator glyphs · 6 density profiles · 5-phase sun/moon glyph · global + per-segment FontWeight/Transparency · 9 DateFormat locales. v1.10 adds B3 (São Paulo, fills Latin America gap) + Carnival theme + Samba Quick Style, /floating-clock:diagnose command, Reveal in Finder menu item, ClipboardHeader extracted into testable module, FCStateIsTrading predicate extracted, 6-cell TZ-structural invariant sweep family (NYSE+TSE+JSE+ASX+LSE+B3), market roster lock upgraded to (id, iana, code) triples. 64 fixtures. Sub-0.1% idle CPU, ~216 KB signed binary.
